summary: Phase Z-API-SPINE-1: registry and collision checks only. Gateway API, service mesh, and live telemetry are future-gated (charter + DRP + DOP).

signal_meanings.GREEN: Required spine rows validate; no unsafe collisions.
signal_meanings.YELLOW: Advisory: optional unknowns, reference-only placeholders, or naming similarity.
signal_meanings.BLUE: Human decision required for deploy/bridge/provider/billing/security posture.
signal_meanings.RED: Malformed required row, duplicate identity, or unsafe route collision.

route_dependency_rules: Two services must not claim the same route_family in production without explicit_route_sharing_with.
reference_only and local environments downgrade collision severity to YELLOW unless risk_class is sacred.
No cross-service entitlement implied by similar display_name alone.
wording_collision_rules: Flag when normalized display names share a high similarity ratio (substring or edit distance) and risk_class differs — advisory YELLOW.
Do not infer shared auth or billing from name similarity.

boundary_notes.drp_14: Sacred and commercial truth remain human-gated; no silent autonomy expansion from spine metadata.
boundary_notes.dop_14: Operational rollout (canary, staged routing) requires charter before any live Gateway or mesh bind.

law_note: API spine ≠ API gateway. Registry ≠ live service mesh. Health check ≠ deploy readiness. Similar name ≠ shared entitlement. GREEN ≠ deploy. BLUE requires AMK. RED blocks movement. AMK-Goku owns sacred moves.
